posts.title: SQL Query Execution Order — Most Devs Get This Wrong
posts.caption:
You write: SELECT → FROM → WHERE → GROUP BY.

SQL executes: FROM → WHERE → GROUP BY → SELECT.

This is why you can't use aliases in WHERE. This is why HAVING exists.

Understanding execution order = writing faster queries.

Did you know SELECT runs almost last? 👇

#sql #database #programming #backenddevelopment #softwareengineering

posts.title: RabbitMQ vs Kafka — Choose the Right One

Simple async tasks? RabbitMQ. Massive event streaming? Kafka.
